scripts.lint:changed: sh -c 'tmp="$(mktemp)"; git diff --name-only -z --diff-filter=ACMRT | node -e "const fs=require(\"node:fs\");const input=fs.readFileSync(0,\"utf8\");const files=input.split(\"\\0\").filter(Boolean).filter((f)=>/\\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/.test(f)&&!/\\.d\\.ts$/.test(f));if(files.length){process.stdout.write(files.join(\"\\0\")+\"\\0\");}" > "$tmp"; if [ ! -s "$tmp" ]; then echo "no changed lintable files"; rm -f "$tmp"; exit 0; fi; xargs -0 npx eslint < "$tmp"; rc=$?; rm -f "$tmp"; exit $rc'
scripts.check:all: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run check:no-palette
scripts.ui:audit: npm run build && PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_OUTPUT_NAME=test-results/ui-audit-report.json playwright test tests/e2e/ui-audit.spec.ts --reporter=html,json && node scripts/ui-audit-summary.mjs
scripts.ui:audit:update: npm run build && PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_OUTPUT_NAME=test-results/ui-audit-report.json playwright test tests/e2e/ui-audit.spec.ts --update-snapshots --reporter=html,json && node scripts/ui-audit-summary.mjs
